claim_boundary: OPEN_TRAIN-only development comparison of label-free monomer/sequence proxies for computational docking contact intermediates and R_dual_min. Not binding, affinity, competition, experimental blocking, Docking Gold, or final submission authority.

forbidden: candidate ID, parent ID, batch ID or design metadata as model inputs
true held-out contact features as prediction inputs

validation.outer_test_contact_access: only after all outer-fold predictions are fixed

nonlinear_expansion.input_standardization: fit on current training fold only

stacking.outer_test_contact_features: proxy fitted on the complete outer-train partition
stacking.contact_target_scaling: fit on each contact-proxy training partition only
stacking.meta_model: Ridge on OOF base predictions/contact proxies

required: paired parent-bootstrap median delta is positive
success_gate.interpretation: C2-C4 must also be compared with C1; improvement over C0 alone is insufficient to attribute gain to contact supervision.
